summary: Methodology Page Update (10 steps) and Prompts Page Testing Complete. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 10 methodology steps with round-robin, Top-K cross-match, evaluation/summary prompt links, and navigation to Prompts page working correctly.

backend: Evaluation prompt has non-empty system_prompt and user_prompt
Summary prompt has system_prompt and user_prompt
Evaluation prompt contains expected keywords (scientific, paper, impact, compare)
frontend: Step 2 mentions 'round-robin rotation' for model selection
Step 4 mentions 'Top-K cross-match' as convergence goal
Step 4 lists all 3 convergence goals (Minimum matches, CI convergence, Top-K cross-match)
Step 2 has link 'View the evaluation prompt' to /prompts
Step 8 (Impact Assessment) has link 'View the summary prompt' to /prompts
Prompts page at /prompts shows 'Comparison Prompt' with system and user prompt
Prompts page shows 'Impact Summary Prompt' with system and user prompt
Prompts page has 'Back to Methodology' link that navigates to /methodology
Navigation between Methodology and Prompts pages works correctly

test_credentials: None required - all tested pages are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified the Methodology page update with 10 steps and the new Prompts page. Key findings: (1) Methodology page correctly shows 10 steps with round-robin rotation in Step 2 and Top-K cross-match in Step 4, (2) Prompts links in Steps 2 and 8 navigate to /prompts correctly, (3) /api/prompts endpoint returns evaluation and summary prompts without authentication, (4) Prompts page shows both Comparison Prompt and Impact Summary Prompt with system and user templates, (5) All navigation links work correctly including Model Analysis link to /correlation. No issues found.
